# Code of Conduct

Micrantha projects aim to be welcoming, professional spaces for collaboration.

## Expected behavior
- Be respectful and constructive.
- Assume good intent; ask clarifying questions.
- Focus on the work: ideas, code, and outcomes.
- Use inclusive language; avoid personal attacks and harassment.
- Respect privacy and security boundaries (no doxxing, no leaking secrets).

## Unacceptable behavior
- Harassment, discrimination, or hateful conduct.
- Threats of violence or intimidation.
- Posting private or sensitive information without consent.
- Deliberate disruption of discussion or collaboration.

## Enforcement
Project maintainers may remove content or restrict participation if behavior violates this code of conduct.

## Reporting
If you experience or witness a problem, report it via the contact method on:
https://micrantha.com
